race.comment: AMBASSADORS (2) then led into the straight before fighting on to be beaten 1.75 lengths over 1400m at Sunshine Coast. Has a 2kg claim and can skip across and ride the speed. Placed his only start here and will be tough to beat. EFFIE'S JOY (7) missed the hat-trick by a nose over 1650m at Beaudesert. Won comfortably this track/trip prior and has a 3kg claimer aboard today. Can bounce with average luck. AIMA SUN (10) was an impressive winner last time over 1540m at this track, leading throughout in a 55 and putting 6 lengths on her rivals. Spiked her figures and has been freshened. Draws wider today but has to be considered. BRUTAL SUE (11) presents third-up for the Munce yard. Gives way starts but has more up her sleeve and can come into it late.
